---
title: "Contact"
format: html
engine: knitr
---

::: {.centered-content}
Email: alexander.skeels\[at\]anu\[dot\]edu\[dot\]au

[ORCID](https://orcid.org/0000-0002-9973-4703)

[Web of Science](https://www.webofscience.com/wos/author/record/AFM-9079-2022)

Bluesky [\@alexskeels.bsky.social](https://bsky.app/profile/alexskeels.bsky.social)

[GitHub](https://github.com/alexskeels)
:::
